meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome the 'no project ideas' trap. An intermediate-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for success.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no project ideas' paralysis by building micro-SaaS tools designed for passive income. By focusing on solving small, recurring pain points for specific niches, you gain portfolio credibility, master AI-driven development with Antigravity and Claude Code, and create a scalable asset that generates revenue while you study.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the student’s greatest enemy. You’ve mastered the syntax and understand the frameworks, yet you stare at a blinking cursor, paralyzed by the 'what should I build?' dilemma. The lack of project ideas isn't a lack of creativity; it's a lack of a framework for identifying market demand.

True engineering mastery comes from building products people actually use. We are shifting your focus from 'coding exercises' to 'passive income assets.' By leveraging AI-agent workflows to identify niche problems, you aren't just building a portfolio piece—you are building a business that proves your technical maturity to future employers.

steps.title: Niche Discovery with AI
steps.description: Identify a repeatable, low-maintenance problem. Use AI to scan forums and directories for recurring 'how to' questions that developers ignore.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these subreddits and indie-hacker forums to identify 5 high-frequency, low-complexity pain points that could be solved with a browser-based micro-tool.

steps.title: Architecting the MVP
steps.description: Define the absolute minimum viable feature set required to solve the problem and accept payments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical architecture document for a micro-SaaS that solves [Problem]. Include a Stripe integration flow and a serverless backend structure.

steps.title: Scaffolding with Claude Code
steps.description: Generate the project structure rapidly to bypass boilerplate fatigue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js project structure with Tailwind CSS, Supabase, and Stripe checkout handlers.

steps.title: Implementing Core Logic
steps.description: Focus on the unique value proposition—the specific logic that solves the user's problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic for the [Problem] solver. Ensure it handles edge cases and returns data in a clean JSON format.

steps.title: Deployment and Automation
steps.description: Ship to production and set up CI/CD so the app runs without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to automatically deploy to Vercel upon merging into the main branch.

pro_tips: Focus on 'utility-first' apps; they require zero ongoing content creation, making them ideal for passive income.
Use Stripe's 'Payment Links' instead of building a complex cart system for your first three projects.
Prioritize SEO-friendly static landing pages; they act as your 24/7 sales team while you are in class.
Add a 'Feedback' button that sends user suggestions directly to your email; this is your R&D department.
Never over-engineer; if the tool works, ship it. Perfection is the enemy of the first dollar earned.
content.next_steps: Once your first app is live, spend one hour a day on organic marketing in the communities where your users hang out, then start planning your next micro-SaaS to build your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for grades and start building for growth. You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to turn a blank screen into a recurring revenue stream. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
